title: Pin full lineage on every registered model
description: Record the training run, dataset snapshot hash, code commit, and hyperparameters with each model version so any served prediction is reproducible.
body: Use when promoting a model into a registry such as MLflow or W&B. Do not register a model as a bare weights blob — without the training run id, dataset snapshot hash, code commit, and resolved hyperparameters you cannot reproduce or audit it later. Actions: capture the run id, immutable dataset hash, git commit, and config into the registry metadata; verify a fresh checkout plus the recorded artifacts rebuilds the same model. Validation signals include a registry entry whose lineage fields resolve to a real run and a reproduced model matching the logged eval metric. Risk boundary: an unlineaged production model is unauditable; if lineage is missing, deny promotion and escalate before serving traffic.
